{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Founder
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] hopes to walk away with a new [[Founder]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c20">''City of Light'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A [[Founder]] is needed to take charge of [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25">''City of Light'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
